name: Cream Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in ¼ cup butter until combined.
3. Add cream, mixing to form a dough.
4. Roll out on a floured board.
5. Cut with a 2-inch cutter.
6. Bake on an ungreased pan in a hot oven of 400°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
